tasks.label: Pull GitHub Issues
args: $python = (Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Source; if (-not $python) { $python = (Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Source }; if (-not $python) { $candidate = Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'Microsoft\WindowsApps\PythonSoftwareFoundation.Python.3.11_qbz5n2kfra8p0\python.exe'; if (Test-Path $candidate) { $python = $candidate } }; if (-not $python) { throw 'No Python interpreter found. Install Python or add it to PATH.' }; & $python 'utility/export-repo-issues.py'

tasks.label: Populate CRDW Scripts
args: $python = (Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Source; if (-not $python) { $python = (Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Source }; if (-not $python) { $candidate = Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'Microsoft\WindowsApps\PythonSoftwareFoundation.Python.3.11_qbz5n2kfra8p0\python.exe'; if (Test-Path $candidate) { $python = $candidate } }; if (-not $python) { throw 'No Python interpreter found. Install Python or add it to PATH.' }; & $python 'utility/populate-scripts.py'
